case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION VS. MARK JONES

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-03-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-26-2020 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,780.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-26-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AN ATTORNEY. I INFORMED THE COUNSELOR THAT ATTORNEYS ARE NOT ALLOWED, HE SAID HE WAS NOT AWARE OF THAT. THEREFORE I LET HIM CONTINUE THE MATTER FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT MARK JONES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
